name: Novel Chemical Manual Entry and Hazard Profiling
description:
You are the EHS Manager at an advanced battery lab. You need to provision a proprietary nanomaterial into the facility's Tier II report. Since it is novel, you must bypass the standard CAMEO chemical lookup and enter it manually. 

EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 is already open. First, create a new facility named 'Advanced Materials R&D'. Then, navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add a new chemical manually with these exact details:

- Chemical Name: Functionalized Graphene Oxide (Ethanol Suspension)
- CAS Number: 1034343-98-0
- EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance): Unchecked (No)
- Physical State: Liquid
- Physical Hazards (check exactly one): Flammable (gases, aerosols, liquids, or solids)
- Health Hazards (check exactly two): Eye Damage or Irritation AND Specific target organ toxicity (single or repeated exposure)

Under the Quantity section, select 'Use Range Codes':
- Maximum Daily Amount: Code 04 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs)
- Average Daily Amount: Code 04 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs)
- Number of Days on Site: 365

Add one Storage Location:
- Location Description: Cleanroom 4 Bulk Storage
- Container Type: Plastic or non-metallic drum
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Temperature: Ambient temperature

Finally, save the submission file (File > Save As) to C:\Tier2Submit\Data\AdvMaterials_2024.t2s (create the Data directory if it does not exist).
